nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Entry point — receives {session_id, client_id, timestamp} from QORA backend. Verify X-Webhook-Signature header against HMAC-SHA256(N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET, body).

nodes.name: Fetch Transcript
nodes.notes: Fetches formatted transcript text from QORA internal API. Returns plain text with 'role: content' lines.

nodes.name: Fetch Extraction Config
nodes.notes: Fetches client extraction config (system_prompt + response_schema). Returns {client_id, system_prompt, response_schema}.

nodes.name: Assemble Prompt
nodes.notes: Code node: combines transcript and system prompt into GPT request format. Runs synchronously — no I/O.

nodes.name: OpenAI GPT Analysis
nodes.notes: GPT-4o-mini structured output. Retries up to 2 times on failure (maxTries=3: 1 initial + 2 retries). continueOnFail=true routes to error branch after all retries fail.

nodes.name: Parse GPT Response
nodes.notes: Parses GPT JSON response. Sets _gpt_failed=true on error, routes to failure branch. On success builds {session_id, summary, facts}.

nodes.name: Check GPT Success
nodes.notes: Routes to success callback (true) or failure notification (false).

nodes.name: Post Analysis Result Callback
nodes.notes: Posts spec-compliant payload {session_id, summary, facts} to QORA internal API. QORA persists result and runs verification comparison.

nodes.name: Log GPT Failure
nodes.notes: Failure notification: reached when GPT analysis fails after all retries (2 retries per maxTries=3). Records failure event in n8n execution history. session_id and error detail are available in $json.

meta.description: QORA post-call analysis pipeline. Triggered by QORA backend when a call ends. Fetches transcript + config, calls GPT-4o-mini with up to 2 retries, posts results back to QORA callback endpoint or logs failure.
requiredEnvVars: QORA_BACKEND_URL — base URL of the QORA backend (e.g. https://api.qora.example.com)
QORA_INTERNAL_SECRET — matches INTERNAL_API_SECRET in QORA .env (header: X-Internal-Secret)
OPENAI_API_KEY — for the OpenAI node credential

authContract.inbound: X-Webhook-Signature: hmac-sha256(N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET, body) — verify in webhook node
authContract.outbound: X-Internal-Secret: <QORA_INTERNAL_SECRET> — all QORA internal API calls

meta.retryStrategy: Built-in n8n retry on OpenAI node: maxTries=3 (1 initial + 2 retries). continueOnFail=true routes to 'Log GPT Failure' node after all retries exhausted.
meta.callbackContract: POST /api/v1/internal/analysis-result with {session_id, summary, facts} — spec-compliant, no 'status' field
meta.notes: Import this JSON into n8n via Settings > Import Workflow. Set QORA_INTERNAL_SECRET env var and configure OpenAI node credential.
